description: Deterministic Rule Engine candidates extracted from Haiku interview analysis. These rules can classify items WITHOUT calling the AI, saving cost and improving consistency.
validation_status: VERIFIED against ground truth — rules marked 'regression_risk' had incorrect interview answers and were corrected

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Depreciation' OR 'Amortization' OR 'Amortisation') AND sheet_name is 'Notes to P & L' AND section contains 'depreciation'
rules.notes: All depreciation/amortization items from P&L notes go to Row 63

rules.condition: IF description contains 'Director Loan' AND section contains 'due to directors'
rules.notes: Director loans are quasi-equity, not operational dues

rules.condition: IF description contains 'Directors Remuneration' AND (section contains 'salaries' OR sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to PL')
rules.notes: Director remuneration is salary, not audit fees

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Contribution to PF' OR 'Labour Welfare' OR 'Provident Fund' OR 'ESI') AND section contains 'employee benefits'
rules.notes: Statutory employee benefits are classified as Wages

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'TDS' OR 'TCS' OR 'Tax Deducted at Source' OR 'Tax Collected at Source') AND (section contains 'tax deducted @ source' OR 'tds & tcs')
rules.notes: TDS/TCS paid by the company are advance taxes, not statutory liabilities

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Packing Materials' OR 'Discount Allowed' OR 'Carriage Outwards' OR 'Sales Promotion') AND section contains 'selling'
rules.notes: All S&D items including packing, carriage outwards, discounts go to Row 70

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Scrap' OR 'Waste') AND (section contains 'materials consumed' OR 'changes in inventories')
rules.notes: Scrap/waste materials consumed are stores and spares

rules.condition: IF description contains 'Advances Written off' AND sheet_name contains 'Notes to P & L'
rules.notes: Write-offs of advances are bad debts, not misc expenses

rules.condition: IF description contains 'Bill Discounting' AND section contains 'borrowing costs'
rules.notes: Bill discounting is a working capital facility

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Interest on C.C.' OR 'Interest on Cash Credit' OR 'Interest on Current Account') AND section contains 'interest'
rules.notes: CC/Current Account interest is working capital, not term loan

rules.condition: IF description contains 'GST Input Recoverable' AND section contains 'current assets'
rules.cma_field: Advances recoverable in cash or in kind
rules.notes: GST input credit is an advance recoverable

rules.condition: IF description contains 'Bonus payable' AND section contains 'other current liabilities'
rules.notes: Bonus payable is a statutory liability

rules.condition: IF (description contains 'Leave Encashment' OR 'Gratuity') AND section contains 'provision for employee benefits'
rules.notes: Employee benefit provisions classified under Provision for Taxation in CMA

rules.condition: IF section contains 'sundry creditors' AND (section contains 'raw materials' OR section contains 'purchases')
rules.notes: All sundry creditors for purchases/raw materials go to Row 242

rules.condition: IF section contains 'director remuneration payable' AND sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to BS'
rules.notes: Director remuneration payable is a creditor for expenses on BS

rules.condition: IF section contains 'bank balances' AND sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to BS'
rules.notes: All bank balances from subnotes (both Dr and Cr) are Row 213 bank balance assets

rules.condition: IF section contains 'capital advances' AND sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to BS'
rules.cma_field: Advances to suppliers of capital goods
rules.notes: Capital advances are advances to suppliers of capital goods

rules.condition: IF section contains 'advance from customers' AND sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to BS'
rules.notes: Customer advances in subnotes go to Row 243

rules.condition: IF section contains 'trade receivables' AND sheet_name contains 'Subnotes to BS' AND description does NOT contain '>6 months' AND description does NOT contain 'more than'
rules.notes: Named trade receivables are domestic receivables

rules.condition: IF description contains 'MAT Credit'
rules.notes: MAT Credit Entitlement is a non-current asset, not deferred tax
